div.p: JIT Code Buffer Lifecycle with Error Handling

ul.li: mmap failure: Out of memory, RLIMIT_AS exceeded
mprotect failure: Invalid address, permission denied by seccomp
SIGSEGV on call: Page not executable (mprotect not called)
SIGBUS on call: Misaligned access, device error

g.text: Required on ARM, no-op on x86
